name: In New York, can insurance deny my firm's claim because I asked AI about business interruption from bad rankings?
description: Risky; AI chats discoverable in NY, could undermine claim.[1]

mainEntity.name: In New York, can insurance deny my firm's claim because I asked AI about business interruption from bad rankings?

acceptedAnswer.text: Risky; AI chats discoverable in NY, could undermine claim.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: Possibly, if AI chats reveal inconsistencies or speculative damages, as they are discoverable in NY courts.[1] No direct precedent, but broad discovery applies.[1] Key factors: AI not privileged, fault admissions harmful.[1] Withhold AI records from insurer, provide only policy-required docs, get coverage counsel.[1] State-specific rules tighten scrutiny.
